meta.title: Edge Schema
meta.description: Typed directed edges between shards in the mycelium graph.

required_fields.edge_type: enum: REF | BUILD | BRIDGE | DUAL | MIRROR | DERIVES | CERTIFIES | REPLAYS | PROMOTES | SEEDS | PROJECTS
required_fields.medium_cross: bool — true if edge crosses mediums

edge_types.REF: General reference (shard A mentions shard B)
edge_types.BUILD: Code module builds on / imports from data file
edge_types.MIRROR: Same content in different medium or repo
edge_types.DERIVES: Shard B is a refined/transformed version of shard A
edge_types.CERTIFIES: Shard B is a cert that validates shard A
edge_types.REPLAYS: Shard B is a replay bundle for shard A
edge_types.PROMOTES: Shard B promoted shard A to a higher status
edge_types.SEEDS: Shard A is the seed/generator for shard B
edge_types.PROJECTS: Shard A projects into shard B (dimensional lift or compression)
